title: Streamlit Exports — vLLM, llama.cpp, MLX
intent: From the Planner page, click each export button in turn and capture the generated deployment config for vLLM, llama.cpp, and MLX.

steps.intent: Planner page ready with a concrete plan already computed; we scroll down to the Export Configuration row.
Export Configuration row in view: three buttons — Export as vLLM, Export as llama.cpp, Export as MLX.
vLLM click: JSON payload with --model, --max-model-len, --max-num-seqs rendered in a code block.
llama.cpp click: CLI arg string (-m, -c, -ngl) emitted for the same plan parameters.
MLX click: Apple Silicon deploy config serialised as JSON, completing the export triple.
